details.test: Task 1: Add latest high-jackpot Macau 6/49 draw to Watched Draws
Task 2: Check Macau Daily 3 ticket and view prize breakdown
Task 3: Choose better-odds game (Macau 6/49 vs Macau Pick 4) and favorite it
Task 4: Create Hot number set from top 5 Macau 6/49 numbers
Task 5: Create custom results view Evening 3&4
Task 6: Set reminders for all Macau 6/49 Friday draws in Jan 2026
Task 7: Star first 2024 Macau 6/49 draw with jackpot between 5M and 7M
Task 8: Tag up to three 2024-09-10 draws with even bonus number
Task 9: Save Number Checker search My 2024 combo for Macau 6/49
